intro: The Office of Technology and Innovation (OTI) was created by Executive Order 3 in January 2022, which combined the city's previously separate technology offices — including the former Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications (DoITT) — under a single leader. OTI now builds and coordinates technology across city government, from emergency services to benefits screening, and directs the city's cyber defense and response strategy through its Office of Cyber Command.

cardHighlights.function: Builds and maintains the city's technology systems and cyber defenses
cardHighlights.scale: Serves as the IT backbone for more than 40 city agencies
